name: ShareASale Affiliate Marketing Network API
what_it_does: ShareASale affiliate marketing network REST API for merchants and publishers to manage affiliate programs, track referral sales, process commissions, and recruit affiliates across a 270,000+ publisher network. Enables AI agents to manage merchant program configuration and creative asset management for affiliate program automation, handle affiliate recruitment and approval workflow for publisher network automation, access real-time click and conversion tracking for performance attribution automation, retrieve commission payment processing and reporting for affiliate compensation automation, manage coupon and deal distribution to publisher network for promotional campaign automation, handle affiliate performance analytics and tier management for program optimization automation, access product feed management for data-driven publisher promotion automation, retrieve transaction reversal and validation for fraud prevention automation, manage deep link generation for publisher content monetization automation, and integrate ShareASale with Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, and e-commerce platforms for end-to-end affiliate marketing automation.
use_cases: Managing affiliate programs from merchant automation agents
Tracking conversions from performance attribution agents
Processing commissions from affiliate payment agents
Recruiting publishers from affiliate network management agents
not_for: B2B SaaS referral programs (use PartnerStack or Rewardful for SaaS affiliate)
Influencer marketing beyond affiliate links (use AspireIQ or Grin)
First-party referral programs without network (use ReferralHero or Friendbuy)
best_when: An e-commerce merchant wanting AI agents to automate affiliate program management, publisher recruitment, conversion tracking, and commission processing through ShareASale's 270,000+ publisher affiliate network owned by Awin.
avoid_when: TRANSACTION VALIDATION WINDOW FOR AUTOMATED REVERSAL: ShareASale merchant transaction validation allows reversals within a defined window (typically 60 days); automated commission processing must account for validation window before marking transactions final; automated immediate commission confirmation creates financial liability when transactions are later reversed. API ACCESS REQUIRES MERCHANT OR PUBLISHER ACCOUNT: ShareASale API access is separately provisioned for merchant accounts and publisher accounts; automated programs must authenticate with appropriate account type; merchant API cannot access publisher-side data and vice versa without separate credentials. PRODUCT FEED FRESHNESS FOR PUBLISHER CONTENT: ShareASale product feeds for publisher promotion require regular merchant updates; automated publisher content generation using product feed must account for feed update frequency; automated product promotion using stale product feed creates publisher content with outdated prices or discontinued products.

auth.notes: ShareASale uses API key and OAuth for integrations. REST API with XML/JSON. Chicago, Illinois HQ. Founded 2000 by Brian Littleton. Acquired by Awin (Axel Springer/United Internet) in 2017 for $35M. Products: Merchant affiliate program, publisher monetization, real-time tracking, commission management, product feeds. Integrations: Shopify, WooCommerce, Magento, BigCommerce. Serves 25,000+ merchants and 270,000+ affiliates. Competes with CJ Affiliate, Rakuten Advertising, and Impact.com for affiliate network.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — merchant setup fee + transaction fees
pricing.paid_tiers: Merchant: $650 setup + $35/mo network access fee + transaction override (20% of commissions paid); Publisher: free to join
pricing.notes: Chicago IL. Awin subsidiary. Setup fee + monthly fee + transaction percentage. No free tier for merchants.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; reporting and transaction queries throttled; webhooks for new transaction, reversal, and payment events

known_agent_gotchas: XML vs JSON RESPONSE FORMAT SELECTION: ShareASale API returns XML by default; automated integrations preferring JSON must explicitly request JSON format; automated XML parsing without format override creates additional parsing complexity for modern JSON-native agent workflows

MERCHANT vs PUBLISHER API ENDPOINT SEPARATION: ShareASale has separate API endpoints for merchant accounts and publisher accounts; automated multi-role programs must maintain separate authentication contexts; automated single-credential access to both merchant and publisher data creates authentication error

TRANSACTION LOCK PERIOD FOR COMMISSION AUTOMATION: ShareASale transactions enter locked status after merchant validation window; automated commission payment processing must verify transaction lock status before disbursement; automated payment for unlocked transactions may create premature commission payment

NETWORK FEE OVERRIDE CALCULATION FOR ROI MODELING: ShareASale charges merchants 20% override on commissions paid to publishers; automated affiliate ROI calculations must include network override fee; automated commission modeling ignoring override fee creates 20% underestimate of true affiliate cost

AFFILIATE APPROVAL WORKFLOW AUTOMATION REQUIRES MANUAL REVIEW POLICY: ShareASale affiliate applications can be auto-approved or manually reviewed; automated affiliate approval without review policy creates unvetted publisher access to merchant program; implement affiliate quality screening before automated approval for brand safety
agent_readiness.security_notes: Affiliate network. GDPR. API key/OAuth. US. Transaction, commission, and publisher data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Affiliate network. GDPR. API key/OAuth. US. Transaction and commission data.
